attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
    NSLN.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
    NSLN.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT, 
    NSLN.SALES_ADJUSTMENT_DATETIME,
    NSLN.COST_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT, 
    NSLN.BASE_PRICE_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT,
    NSLN.SELLING_PRICE_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT, 
    NSLN.IDE_IFC_ADJ_INITIATOR_NAME,
    NSLN.IDE_IFC_ADJ_APPROVER_NAME, 
    NSLN.IDE_IFC_ADJ_APPROVAL_DATE,
    NSLN.IDE_IFC_COMMENT_1_TXT, 
    NSLN.IDE_IFC_COMMENT_2_TXT,
    NSLN.IDE_IFC_COMMENT_3_TXT, 
    NSLN.IDE_IFC_COMMENT_4_TXT,
    NSLN.IDE_IFC_COMMENT_5_TXT,
    
    NSLN.IDE_IFC_DESCRIPTION_TXT,
    NSLN.IDE_IFC_ADJ_REPORTING_TYPE_CD, 
    NSLN.IDE_IFC_IDE_REPORTED_DEAL_ID,
    NSLN.IDE_IFC_IDE_RPTD_PROD_TYPE_CD, 
    NSLN.DV_CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLAG,
    NSLN.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, 
    NSLN.RU_BK_TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID,
    NSLN.RU_BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID, 
    NSLN.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
    NSLN.RU_BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER, 
    NSLN.RU_BK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,
    NSLN.RU_BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE, 
    NSLN.RU_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID,
    NSLN.RU_BK_SALES_CR_TYPE_CODE, 
    NSLN.RU_BK_SALES_CR_TYPE_ORIGIN_CD,
    NSLN.RU_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT, 
    NSLN.RU_BK_POSCRA_SALES_REP_NUMBER,
    NSLN.PRODUCT_HIERARCHY_TYPE, 
    NSLN.POS_SALES_CREDIT_ROLE,
    NSLN.SALES_REPRESENTATIVE_ROLE, 
    NSLN.SALES_ORDER_ROLE,
    NSLN.POS_ROLE, 
    NSLN.CUSTOMER_ROLE,
    NSLN.SALES_CHANNEL_ROLE, 
    NSLN.SS_CODE,
    NSLN.SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG, 
    NSLN.SALES_ADJUSTMENT_DATE,
    NSLN.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE, 
    NSLN.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,
    NSLN.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT, 
    NSLN.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
    BKG.PROCESS_DATE, 
    NSLN.REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_LINT,
    NSLN.SALES_ORDER_KEY, 
    NSLN.PRODUCT_KEY,
    NSLN.DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG, 
    NSLN.SUBMITTED_BY_NAME,
    /*NSLN.EDW_CREATE_USER, 
    NSLN.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
    NSLN.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME, 
    NSLN.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,*/
   USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
   USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
   CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
   CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
    NSLN.SALES_ADJ_LINE_CREATED_DTM, 
    NSLN.MANAGED_SERVICES_ROLE,
    NSLN.RU_MS_TRANSACTION_GROUP_CD, 
    NSLN.RU_MS_DEAL_IDNTFCTN_METHOD_CD,
    NSLN.RU_SRC_RPTD_MS_PARTNER_ID_INT, 
    NSLN.RU_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,
    NSLN.DV_SERVICE_CATEGORY_CD, 
    NSLN.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG,
    NSLN.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG, 
    NSLN.DV_CORPORATE_BOOKING_FLG,
    NSLN.SERVICE_TYPE_CD, 
    NSLN.MANUAL_TRX_KEY,
    NSLN.DV_LATEST_FLG, 
    NSLN.DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG,
    NSLN.NET_CHANGE_PROCESS_DT, 
    NSLN.SRC_RPTD_ADDITIONAL_CMNT_TXT,
    NSLN.SRC_RPTD_SALES_REP_NUM, 
    NSLN.SRC_RPTD_SHARE_NODE_ID_INT,
    NSLN.SRC_RPTD_PRDT_ID, 
    NSLN.SK_TRX_SALES_CREDIT_ID_INT ,
    NSLN.END_CUST_REBOK_CUST_KEY         , 
    NSLN.SHIP_TO_REBOK_CUST_KEY    ,
    NSLN.SOLD_TO_REBOK_CUST_KEY     ,
    NSLN.BILL_TO_REBOK_CUST_KEY  ,
    NSLN.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT,
    NSLN.TRANSACTION_QTY,
    NSLN.SALES_MOTION_CD,
 NSLN.RU_NEW_RENEW_DSV_FLG,
 NSLN.RU_NEW_RENEW_SOL_KEY,
 NSLN.RU_BK_NEW_RENEW_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
  /* added as part of EDW_Inherit_New_Attributes_from_1CAT_June_Release */
   /* NSLN.IDE_IFC_COMMENT_6_TXT,*/
    NSLN.INHERITANCE_FLAG,
	NSLN.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_USAGE_CD,
	NSLN.MANUAL_TRX_BOOKING_REVENUE_CD,
	NSLN.DV_MULTI_YEAR_US_NET_AMT,
	NSLN.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM,
    NSLN.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM,
    NSLN.DV_ANNUALIZED_FLG,
    NSLN.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT,
    NSLN.DV_CONTRACT_DURATION,
	NSLN.BOOKINGS_POLICY_CD,
     NSLN.IDE_IFC_COMMENT_6_TXT,
RBT_PRGRM_BSNESS_TRCK_NAME    ,
RBT_PRGRM_SUB_BSNESS_TRCK_NAME,
REBATE_TYPE_CD                ,
REBATE_APPLIED_METHOD_CD    ,
CHARGE_TYPE_CD ,
DV_ANNUITY_RELEASE_FLAG,	/*Added as part of iACV Dec rel */
DV_INV_DTM,
DV_INV_DT,
PAY_ON_POLICY_FLAG,
TRANSACTION_UPLOADED_DTM,
DV_TRANSACTION_UPLOADED_DT,
/*FY25 DEC AI RELEASE START*/
TRANSACTION_AI_FLG,
AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD,
TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME,
/*FY25 DEC AI RELEASE END*/
NSLN.BUYING_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME,
NSLN.ATTRIBUTION_CD

 , FRST_YR_ANNUAL_USD_AMT AS FRST_YR_ANNUAL_USD_AMT 
 , MULTI_YEAR_USD_AMT AS MULTI_YEAR_USD_AMT 
 , LINKED_BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT AS LINKED_BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT FROM $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SALES_ADJUSTMENT_LINE_NRT NSLN, 
                $$ETLVWDB.BKG_PROCESS_DT_CNTRL BKG
   WHERE NSLN.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME > ( SELECT EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME FROM $$STGDB.WI_N_SALES_ADJ_LN_INCR )
     AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ADJUSTMENT_LINE NSAL
                       WHERE NSAL.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT = NSLN.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT )
     AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_NC_PRCS_DT_CHK EX 
                      WHERE EX.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT = NSLN.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT)

SELECT 
   WSAL.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT, 
      WSAL.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT, 
      WSAL.SALES_ADJUSTMENT_DATETIME, 
      WSAL.COST_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT, 
      WSAL.BASE_PRICE_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT, 
      WSAL.SELLING_PRICE_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT, 
      WSAL.IDE_IFC_ADJ_INITIATOR_NAME, 
      WSAL.IDE_IFC_ADJ_APPROVER_NAME, 
      WSAL.IDE_IFC_ADJ_APPROVAL_DATE, 
      WSAL.IDE_IFC_COMMENT_1_TXT, 
      WSAL.IDE_IFC_COMMENT_2_TXT, 
      WSAL.IDE_IFC_COMMENT_3_TXT, 
      WSAL.IDE_IFC_COMMENT_4_TXT, 
      WSAL.IDE_IFC_COMMENT_5_TXT,
      
      WSAL.IDE_IFC_DESCRIPTION_TXT, 
      WSAL.IDE_IFC_ADJ_REPORTING_TYPE_CD, 
      WSAL.IDE_IFC_IDE_REPORTED_DEAL_ID, 
      WSAL.IDE_IFC_IDE_RPTD_PROD_TYPE_CD, 
      WSAL.DV_CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLAG, 
      WSAL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, 
      WSAL.RU_BK_TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID, 
      WSAL.RU_BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID, 
      WSAL.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID, 
      WSAL.RU_BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER, 
      WSAL.RU_BK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_NUMBER, 
      WSAL.RU_BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE, 
      WSAL.RU_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID, 
      WSAL.RU_BK_SALES_CR_TYPE_CODE, 
      WSAL.RU_BK_SALES_CR_TYPE_ORIGIN_CD, 
      WSAL.RU_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT, 
      WSAL.RU_BK_POSCRA_SALES_REP_NUMBER, 
      WSAL.PRODUCT_HIERARCHY_TYPE, 
      WSAL.POS_SALES_CREDIT_ROLE, 
      WSAL.SALES_REPRESENTATIVE_ROLE, 
      WSAL.SALES_ORDER_ROLE, 
      WSAL.POS_ROLE, 
      WSAL.CUSTOMER_ROLE, 
      WSAL.SALES_CHANNEL_ROLE, 
      WSAL.SS_CODE, 
      WSAL.SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG, 
      WSAL.SALES_ADJUSTMENT_DATE, 
      WSAL.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE, 
      WSAL.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT, 
      WSAL.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT, 
      WSAL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT, 
      WSAL.PROCESS_DATE, 
      WSAL.REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_LINT, 
      WSAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY, 
      WSAL.PRODUCT_KEY, 
      WSAL.DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG, 
      WSAL.SUBMITTED_BY_NAME, 
      WSAL.EDW_CREATE_USER, 
      WSAL.EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
      WSAL.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME, 
      WSAL.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME, 
      WSAL.SALES_ADJ_LINE_CREATED_DTM, 
      WSAL.MANAGED_SERVICES_ROLE, 
      WSAL.RU_MS_TRANSACTION_GROUP_CD, 
      WSAL.RU_MS_DEAL_IDNTFCTN_METHOD_CD, 
      WSAL.RU_SRC_RPTD_MS_PARTNER_ID_INT, 
      WSAL.RU_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY, 
      WSAL.DV_SERVICE_CATEGORY_CD, 
      WSAL.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG, 
      WSAL.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG, 
      WSAL.DV_CORPORATE_BOOKING_FLG, 
      WSAL.SERVICE_TYPE_CD, 
      WSAL.MANUAL_TRX_KEY, 
      WSAL.DV_LATEST_FLG, 
      WSAL.DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG, 
      WSAL.NET_CHANGE_PROCESS_DT, 
      WSAL.SRC_RPTD_ADDITIONAL_CMNT_TXT, 
      WSAL.SRC_RPTD_SALES_REP_NUM, 
      WSAL.SRC_RPTD_SHARE_NODE_ID_INT, 
      WSAL.SRC_RPTD_PRDT_ID, 
      WSAL.SK_TRX_SALES_CREDIT_ID_INT ,
      WSAL.END_CUST_REBOK_CUST_KEY         , 
      WSAL.SHIP_TO_REBOK_CUST_KEY    ,
      WSAL.SOLD_TO_REBOK_CUST_KEY     ,
      WSAL.BILL_TO_REBOK_CUST_KEY ,
      WSAL.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT, 
      WSAL.TRANSACTION_QTY,
      WSAL.SALES_MOTION_CD,
      WSAL.RU_NEW_RENEW_DSV_FLG,
      WSAL.RU_NEW_RENEW_SOL_KEY,
      WSAL.RU_BK_NEW_RENEW_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
	   /* added as part of EDW_Inherit_New_Attributes_from_1CAT_June_Release */
      /*WSAL.IDE_IFC_COMMENT_6_TXT,*/
      WSAL.INHERITANCE_FLAG,
	  WSAL.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_USAGE_CD,
	  WSAL.MANUAL_TRX_BOOKING_REVENUE_CD,
	  -999 AS SALES_ADJ_ANLZD_BKG_TRX_KEY   ,
	  'N' AS  TRANSACTIONAL_ACV_FLG      ,   
	  'N'  AS HISTORY_FLG        ,           
	  'N' AS  ANNUAL_FLG      ,              
	  0 AS ORIG_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT ,
	  0 AS ORIG_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT ,   
	  0 AS ORIG_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT  ,  
	  0 AS DV_RUNNING_TOTAL_USD_AMT   , 
	  WSAL.DV_MULTI_YEAR_US_NET_AMT	, 	  
	  0 AS ORDER_VALUE_USD_AMT     , 
      WSAL.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM,
      WSAL.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM,
      WSAL.DV_ANNUALIZED_FLG,
      WSAL.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT,
      WSAL.DV_CONTRACT_DURATION,	      
	  WSAL.BOOKINGS_POLICY_CD,
      WSAL.IDE_IFC_COMMENT_6_TXT,
      WSAL.RBT_PRGRM_BSNESS_TRCK_NAME    ,
      WSAL.RBT_PRGRM_SUB_BSNESS_TRCK_NAME,
      WSAL.REBATE_TYPE_CD                ,
      WSAL.REBATE_APPLIED_METHOD_CD    	  ,
	  WSAL.CHARGE_TYPE_CD	,
	  WSAL.DV_ANNUITY_RELEASE_FLAG,	/*Added as part of iACV Dec rel */
	  WSAL.DV_INV_DTM,
      WSAL.DV_INV_DT,
      WSAL.PAY_ON_POLICY_FLAG,
      WSAL.TRANSACTION_UPLOADED_DTM,
      WSAL.DV_TRANSACTION_UPLOADED_DT,
	  /*FY25 DEC AI RELEASE START*/
	  WSAL.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG,
	  WSAL.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD,
	  WSAL.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME,
	  /*FY25 DEC AI RELEASE END*/
	  WSAL.BUYING_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME,
	  WSAL.ATTRIBUTION_CD

 , FRST_YR_ANNUAL_USD_AMT AS FRST_YR_ANNUAL_USD_AMT 
 , MULTI_YEAR_USD_AMT AS MULTI_YEAR_USD_AMT 
 , LINKED_BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT AS LINKED_BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT FROM $$STGDB.W_SALES_ADJUSTMENT_LINE_BATCH WSAL

SELECT 
   WSAL.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
   WSAL.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT, 
   WSAL.SALES_ADJUSTMENT_DATETIME,
   WSAL.COST_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT, 
   WSAL.BASE_PRICE_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT,
   WSAL.SELLING_PRICE_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT, 
   WSAL.IDE_IFC_ADJ_INITIATOR_NAME,
   WSAL.IDE_IFC_ADJ_APPROVER_NAME, 
   WSAL.IDE_IFC_ADJ_APPROVAL_DATE,
   WSAL.IDE_IFC_COMMENT_1_TXT, 
   WSAL.IDE_IFC_COMMENT_2_TXT,
   WSAL.IDE_IFC_COMMENT_3_TXT, 
   WSAL.IDE_IFC_COMMENT_4_TXT,
   WSAL.IDE_IFC_COMMENT_5_TXT,
   
   WSAL.IDE_IFC_DESCRIPTION_TXT,
   WSAL.IDE_IFC_ADJ_REPORTING_TYPE_CD, 
   WSAL.IDE_IFC_IDE_REPORTED_DEAL_ID,
   WSAL.IDE_IFC_IDE_RPTD_PROD_TYPE_CD, 
   WSAL.DV_CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLAG,
   WSAL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, 
   WSAL.RU_BK_TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID,
   WSAL.RU_BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID, 
   WSAL.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
   WSAL.RU_BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER, 
   WSAL.RU_BK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,
   WSAL.RU_BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE, 
   WSAL.RU_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID,
   WSAL.RU_BK_SALES_CR_TYPE_CODE, 
   WSAL.RU_BK_SALES_CR_TYPE_ORIGIN_CD,
   WSAL.RU_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT, 
   WSAL.RU_BK_POSCRA_SALES_REP_NUMBER,
   WSAL.PRODUCT_HIERARCHY_TYPE, 
   WSAL.POS_SALES_CREDIT_ROLE,
   WSAL.SALES_REPRESENTATIVE_ROLE, 
   WSAL.SALES_ORDER_ROLE,
   WSAL.POS_ROLE, 
   WSAL.CUSTOMER_ROLE,
   WSAL.SALES_CHANNEL_ROLE, 
   WSAL.SS_CODE,
   WSAL.SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG, 
   WSAL.SALES_ADJUSTMENT_DATE,
   WSAL.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE, 
   WSAL.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,
   WSAL.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT, 
   WSAL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
   WSAL.PROCESS_DATE, 
   WSAL.REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_LINT,
   WSAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY, 
   WSAL.PRODUCT_KEY,
   WSAL.DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG, 
   WSAL.SUBMITTED_BY_NAME,
   WSAL.EDW_CREATE_USER, 
   WSAL.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
   WSAL.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME, 
   WSAL.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
   WSAL.SALES_ADJ_LINE_CREATED_DTM, 
   WSAL.MANAGED_SERVICES_ROLE,
   WSAL.RU_MS_TRANSACTION_GROUP_CD, 
   WSAL.RU_MS_DEAL_IDNTFCTN_METHOD_CD,
   WSAL.RU_SRC_RPTD_MS_PARTNER_ID_INT, 
   WSAL.RU_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,
   WSAL.DV_SERVICE_CATEGORY_CD, 
   WSAL.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG,
   WSAL.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG, 
   WSAL.DV_CORPORATE_BOOKING_FLG,
   WSAL.SERVICE_TYPE_CD, 
   WSAL.MANUAL_TRX_KEY,
   WSAL.DV_LATEST_FLG, 
   WSAL.DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG,
   WSAL.NET_CHANGE_PROCESS_DT, 
   WSAL.SRC_RPTD_ADDITIONAL_CMNT_TXT,
   WSAL.SRC_RPTD_SALES_REP_NUM, 
   WSAL.SRC_RPTD_SHARE_NODE_ID_INT,
   WSAL.SRC_RPTD_PRDT_ID, 
   WSAL.SK_TRX_SALES_CREDIT_ID_INT  , 
   WSAL.END_CUST_REBOK_CUST_KEY         , 
   WSAL.SHIP_TO_REBOK_CUST_KEY    ,
   WSAL.SOLD_TO_REBOK_CUST_KEY     ,
   WSAL.BILL_TO_REBOK_CUST_KEY ,
   WSAL.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT,
   WSAL.TRANSACTION_QTY,
   WSAL.SALES_MOTION_CD,
   WSAL.RU_NEW_RENEW_DSV_FLG,
   WSAL.RU_NEW_RENEW_SOL_KEY,
   WSAL.RU_BK_NEW_RENEW_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
    /* added as part of EDW_Inherit_New_Attributes_from_1CAT_June_Release */
   /*WSAL.IDE_IFC_COMMENT_6_TXT,*/
   WSAL.INHERITANCE_FLAG,
   WSAL.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_USAGE_CD,
   WSAL.MANUAL_TRX_BOOKING_REVENUE_CD,
   WSAL.DV_MULTI_YEAR_US_NET_AMT,
   WSAL.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM,
   WSAL.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM, 
   WSAL.DV_ANNUALIZED_FLG,
   WSAL.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT,
   WSAL.DV_CONTRACT_DURATION,
   WSAL.BOOKINGS_POLICY_CD,
  WSAL.IDE_IFC_COMMENT_6_TXT,
   WSAL.RBT_PRGRM_BSNESS_TRCK_NAME    ,
   WSAL.RBT_PRGRM_SUB_BSNESS_TRCK_NAME,
   WSAL.REBATE_TYPE_CD                ,
   WSAL.REBATE_APPLIED_METHOD_CD    ,
   WSAL.CHARGE_TYPE_CD	,
   WSAL.DV_ANNUITY_RELEASE_FLAG,	/*Added as part of iACV Dec rel */
   WSAL.DV_INV_DTM,
   WSAL.DV_INV_DT,
   WSAL.PAY_ON_POLICY_FLAG,
   WSAL.TRANSACTION_UPLOADED_DTM,
   WSAL.DV_TRANSACTION_UPLOADED_DT,
   /*FY25 DEC AI RELEASE START*/
   WSAL.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG,
   WSAL.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD,
   WSAL.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME,
   /*FY25 DEC AI RELEASE END*/
   WSAL.BUYING_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME,
   WSAL.ATTRIBUTION_CD

 , MULTI_YEAR_USD_AMT AS MULTI_YEAR_USD_AMT 
 , LINKED_BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT AS LINKED_BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT FROM  $$STGDB.W_SALES_ADJUSTMENT_LINE_BATCH WSAL,
        $$ETLVWDB.BKG_PROCESS_DT_CNTRL BKG
  WHERE WSAL.NET_CHANGE_PROCESS_DT > BKG.PROCESS_DATE
    AND NOT EXISTS ( SEL 1 FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_NC_PRCS_DT_CHK EX WHERE 
                                              EX.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT = WSAL.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT )

SELECT 
   EX.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
   EX.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT,
   EX.SALES_ADJUSTMENT_DATETIME,
   EX.COST_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT,
   EX.BASE_PRICE_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT,
   EX.SELLING_PRICE_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT,

   EX.IDE_IFC_IDE_RPTD_PROD_TYPE_CD,
   EX.DV_CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLAG,

   EX.RU_BK_TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID,
   EX.RU_BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID,
   EX.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
   EX.RU_BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER,
   EX.RU_BK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,
   EX.RU_BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,
   EX.RU_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID,
   EX.RU_BK_SALES_CR_TYPE_CODE,
   EX.RU_BK_SALES_CR_TYPE_ORIGIN_CD,
   EX.RU_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
   EX.RU_BK_POSCRA_SALES_REP_NUMBER,
   EX.PRODUCT_HIERARCHY_TYPE,
   EX.POS_SALES_CREDIT_ROLE,
   EX.SALES_REPRESENTATIVE_ROLE,
   EX.SALES_ORDER_ROLE,
   EX.POS_ROLE,
   EX.CUSTOMER_ROLE,
   EX.SALES_CHANNEL_ROLE,
   EX.SS_CODE,
   EX.SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG,
   EX.SALES_ADJUSTMENT_DATE,
   EX.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE,
   EX.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,
